HGSS.516.0000:
Fwahahahaha!\f
I am Koga of the Elite Four.
I live in shadows--a ninja!\f
My intricate style will confound and
destroy you!\f
Confusion, sleep, poison...\f
Prepare to be the victim of my
sinister techniques!\f
Fwahahahaha!\f
Pokémon are not merely about brute
force--you shall see soon enough!\f
HGSS.516.0001:
I subjected you to everything I could
muster. But my efforts failed.\f
I must hone my skills.\f
Go on to the next room, and
put your abilities to the test!\f
